KXNPBGAME-26JUL110500TOHFUK-FUK.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
KXNPBGAME-26JUL110500TOHFUK-FUK.rules_primary: If Fukuoka Hawks wins the Tohoku Rakuten Golden Eagles vs Fukuoka Hawks Japan NPB game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 5:00 AM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXNPBGAME-26JUL110500TOHFUK-FUK.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Tohoku Rakuten Golden Eagles vs Fukuoka Hawks Japan NPB game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 at 5:00 AM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If the game ends in a tie the markets will resolve to 50/50.
KXNPBGAME-26JUL110500TOHFUK-FUK.title: Tohoku Rakuten Golden Eagles vs Fukuoka Hawks winner?
